initial.intro: Give your Virtual Contributor a name and choose where its knowledge comes from.
initial.name: Name
initial.pathTitle: Where does its knowledge come from?

existingSpace.title: Existing Space
existingSpace.subtitle: Use a Space you can access

addKnowledge.intro: What knowledge do you want your Virtual Contributor to have? Write it down in posts or upload it in documents. You can update, add, and remove content later.
addKnowledge.exampleDescription: Tip: Create a structured and specific text, for example: Background Alkemio, founded in 2020, was born out of frustration with slow progress on COVID-related challenges and a recognition of the numerous fast-moving challenges we face daily. Governance To maintain trust and realize our long-term vision, we’ve adopted Steward Ownership as our core group structure. Steward ownership is...

existingSpace.intro: Choose a Space to use as the body of knowledge.

chooseCommunity.intro: Add your Virtual Contributor to a community, or skip for now.
chooseCommunity.errorMessage: Couldn't add to the community — try again.

tryVc.title: {{name}} is ready!
tryVc.description: Your Virtual Contributor has been created.

createdVirtualContributor.errorMessage: Couldn't create the Virtual Contributor — try again.

phone.label: Phone
phone.invalidFormat: Phone number not in supported format

tagline.label: Tagline
tagline.hint: A short line shown on your profile.

skills.label: Skills
skills.hint: Skills you can offer. Press Enter to add.

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.hint: Keywords describing your interests. Press Enter to add.

deleteDialog.title: Remove reference?
deleteDialog.description: Removing this reference will also delete it from your public profile after you save.

homeSpace.title: Home Space
homeSpace.description: Choose a Space to land on after sign-in. You can also enable auto-redirect.
homeSpace.autoRedirectLabel: Auto-redirect to my Home Space after sign-in
homeSpace.autoRedirectDisabledHint: Select a Home Space to enable auto-redirect.

myMemberships.title: My Memberships
myMemberships.empty: You're not a member of any Spaces yet.
myMemberships.filteredEmptyDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

leave.dialogDescription: You're about to leave "{{spaceName}}". You'll lose access to its members-only content and will need to re-apply to rejoin.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage passkeys and WebAuthn credentials for your account.
security.notEnabled: WebAuthn / Passkey is not enabled on this account.
security.errorDescription: Couldn't load security settings — try refreshing the page.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Update the password used to sign in to your account.
password.notEnabled: Password sign-in is not enabled on this account.

communication.title: Communication & Privacy
communication.allowMessagesLabel: Allow other users to send me direct messages
communication.allowMessagesDescription: When off, other users won't be able to start a direct-message conversation with you.

designSystem.title: Design System
designSystem.description: Switch between the new (CRD) and the classic (MUI) design. This preference is stored locally on this device.
designSystem.reloadCaption: The page will reload after the change.

notifications.helpBanner: Edit your notification preferences. Changes are saved automatically.

push.masterToggleDescription: Enable push notifications on this device. You can fine-tune which events trigger them below.
push.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Update browser settings to enable push.
push.unavailable: Push notifications aren't available in this browser.
push.requiresPwa: Push notifications require installing this app to your home screen.
push.error: Couldn't update push subscription — try again

space.title: Space Notifications
space.description: Manage notifications for space-related events like posts, comments, and community updates.

spaceAdmin.title: Space Admin Notifications
spaceAdmin.description: Notifications for spaces where you are an admin or lead.

user.title: User Notifications
user.description: Personalise alerts for interactions like replies, mentions, and invites.

platform.title: Platform Notifications
platform.description: Stay updated on platform-level discussions, new features, and announcements.

platformAdmin.title: Platform Admin Notifications
platformAdmin.description: Notifications for platform administrators (user lifecycle, space creation).

organization.title: Organisation Notifications
organization.description: Control alerts for organisation mentions, messaging, and team updates.

virtualContributor.title: Virtual Contributor Notifications
virtualContributor.description: Notifications regarding virtual contributor activities and assignments.

space.communicationUpdates: Receive a notification when a new communication is shared on a community
space.collaborationCalloutPublished: Receive a notification when a callout is published in a community I am a member of
space.collaborationCalloutPostContributionComm: Receive a notification when a comment is made on a post I follow
space.collaborationCalloutContributionCreated: Receive a notification when a new contribution is created on a callout
space.collaborationCalloutComment: Receive a notification when a new comment is added to a callout I follow
space.communityCalendarEvents: Receive a notification for community calendar events
space.collaborationPollVoteCastOnOwnPoll: Receive a notification when someone votes on my poll
space.collaborationPollVoteCastOnPollIVotedOn: Receive a notification when someone votes on a poll I voted on
space.collaborationPollModifiedOnPollIVotedOn: Receive a notification when a poll I voted on is modified
space.collaborationPollVoteAffectedByOptionCha: Receive a notification when my vote is affected by a poll option change

spaceAdmin.communityApplicationReceived: Receive a notification when a new community application is submitted
spaceAdmin.communityNewMember: Receive a notification when a new member joins the community
spaceAdmin.collaborationCalloutContributionCreated: Receive a notification when a new contribution is created on a callout
spaceAdmin.communicationMessageReceived: Receive a notification when a community message is received
spaceAdmin.userEmailChanged: Receive a notification when the login email of a member of a space you administer is changed

user.commentReply: Receive a notification when someone replies to my comment
user.mentioned: Receive a notification when I am mentioned
user.messageReceived: Receive a notification when someone sends me a direct message
user.membershipInvitationReceived: Receive a notification when someone invites me to join a community
user.membershipCommunityJoined: Receive a notification when I join a new Space

platform.forumDiscussionComment: Receive a notification when a new comment is added to a discussion I follow
platform.forumDiscussionCreated: Receive a notification when a new platform discussion is created

platformAdmin.userProfileCreated: Receive a notification when a new user profile is created
platformAdmin.userProfileRemoved: Receive a notification when a user profile is removed
platformAdmin.userGlobalRoleChanged: Receive a notification when a user's global role changes
platformAdmin.userEmailChanged: Receive a notification when a user's email address changes
platformAdmin.spaceCreated: Receive a notification when a new space is created

organization.adminMentioned: Receive a notification when my organisation is mentioned
organization.adminMessageReceived: Receive direct messages to my organisation

virtualContributor.adminSpaceCommunityInvitation: Receive a notification when a VC manager is invited to join a community

organizations.empty: You're not associated with any organisations yet.
organizations.filteredEmptyDescription: Try searching for a different name or location.

disassociate.dialogDescription: You're about to leave "{{name}}". You'll lose your associate role and any related permissions.

account.helpBanner: Here you can view your active resources and manage your account allocation limits.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this resource?
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently remove "{{name}}". This cannot be undone.

displayName.label: Display Name
displayName.hint: How your organisation appears across Alkemio.

tagline.label: Tagline
tagline.hint: A short line shown next to your organisation name.

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.hint: Topics your organisation works on. Press Enter to add.

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.hint: What your organisation can do or offer. Press Enter to add.

contactEmail.label: Contact Email
contactEmail.hint: Public contact email for the organisation.

deleteDialog.title: Remove reference?
deleteDialog.description: Removing this reference will also delete it from the public profile after you save.

account.helpBanner: Here you can view your organisation's active resources and manage account allocation limits.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this resource?
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently remove "{{name}}". This cannot be undone.

community.title: Associates
community.description: Manage who is associated with this organisation. Add new associates from the available users list; removing an associate revokes their organisation role.
community.removeDialogDescription: {{name}} will lose their associate role and any related permissions.

authorization.title: Authorisation
authorization.description: Assign Admin and Owner roles for this organisation. Admins can manage day-to-day settings; Owners have full control over the organisation.
authorization.removeDialogDescription: {{name}} will lose this role and any related permissions.

membership.title: Membership
membership.allowDomainLabel: Allow users matching the organisation's domain to join
membership.allowDomainCaption: When enabled, users whose email domain matches this organisation can self-join without an invitation.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.contributionRolesCaption: When enabled, the organisation's role assignments (Admin, Owner, Associate) are visible on its public profile.

promptGraph.title: Prompt Graph
promptGraph.helper: Edit the prompt state machine. System nodes are read-only; user nodes expose an editable prompt and output properties.
promptGraph.disabled: Prompt-graph editing is disabled for this Virtual Contributor.
promptGraph.empty: This Virtual Contributor has no prompt graph.

resetConfirm.title: Reset prompt graph?
resetConfirm.description: This clears the entire prompt graph and cannot be undone.

displayName.label: Display Name
displayName.hint: How this Virtual Contributor appears across Alkemio.

tagline.label: Tagline
tagline.hint: A short line shown on the contributor's profile.

description.label: Description
description.hint: Explain what this Virtual Contributor does and how to work with it.

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.hint: Add keywords to help users discover this Virtual Contributor.
keywords.placeholder: Add a keyword and press Enter

deleteDialog.title: Remove reference?
deleteDialog.description: This reference will be removed when you save the section. You can undo before saving.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.helperText: Square JPEG or PNG, up to 5 MB.

membership.empty: This Virtual Contributor isn't a member of any space yet.
membership.leaveConfirmBody: Remove this Virtual Contributor from {{name}}? This can be reversed by re-applying for membership.

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.helper: Controls who can discover this Virtual Contributor.
visibility.publicDescription: Everyone, including anonymous visitors, can find this Virtual Contributor.
visibility.accountDescription: Only members of the host account can find this Virtual Contributor.
visibility.hiddenDescription: This Virtual Contributor is hidden from search.
visibility.listedInStoreHelper: Only available when Visibility is Public.

bodyOfKnowledge.title: Body of Knowledge
bodyOfKnowledge.helper: Manage how this Virtual Contributor's knowledge base is exposed.
bodyOfKnowledge.privacyToggleHelper: When enabled, the underlying content is hidden from users without access.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.helpText: Available variables: duration, audience, workshop_type, role, purpose.

externalConfig.title: External AI Configuration
externalConfig.helper: Connect this Virtual Contributor to an external AI provider.
externalConfig.apiKeyHelper: Existing keys are never echoed back. Leave blank to keep the current key.

avatarCropDialog.title: Crop avatar
avatarCropDialog.description: Drag to reposition. The image will be cropped and resized before upload.

capacity.innovationHubsTooltip: You have created {{usage}} out of your {{limit}} available Custom Homepages in your account.

createNewSpace.heading: Create New Space
createNewSpace.description: Launch a new collaborative environment for your team.

description.virtualContributors: You've reached your Virtual Contributors capacity. Contact the Alkemio team to request more.
